body.head:
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/mermaid/dist/mermaid.min.js"></script>
            <script>
                document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
                    // 1. Locate all Doxia-generated code blocks for mermaid
                    var mermaidBlocks = document.querySelectorAll('code.language-mermaid');
                    mermaidBlocks.forEach(function(block) {
                        var pre = block.parentElement;
                        // Skip if already transformed or not in a <pre>
                        if (pre && pre.tagName.toLowerCase() === 'pre') {
                            var parent = pre.parentElement;
                            var div = document.createElement('div');
                            div.className = 'mermaid';
                            // Extract raw text to avoid <span> tags from prettify
                            div.textContent = block.textContent;
                            // Replace the entire <pre> structure with the new <div>
                            parent.replaceChild(div, pre);
                        }
                    });
                    // 2. Initialize and render with the new elements
                    mermaid.initialize({ startOnLoad: true });
                    mermaid.init();
                });
            </script>
